title: Expand remaining 7 service category cards with complete sub-service lists on Services page

requirements.text:
Update the Services page (frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx) to replace the existing sub-service items in the following 7 service category cards with the exact lists provided below. Do not change the card layout, design, icons, grid structure, or any other section of the page — only replace the sub-service bullet/list items within each card:

1. FSSAI License — replace existing sub-items with: FSSAI Registration, FSSAI State License, FSSAI Central License, FPO Mark Certification, FSSAI Annual Return Filing.

2. Trademark Registration — replace existing sub-items with: Trademark Registration, Trademark Objection / Opposition Reply, Trademark Hearing, Brand Name Registration, Design Registration, Copyright Registration, Patent Registration.

3. Pollution Control Board — replace existing sub-items with: CGWA Water Boring, CTE / CTO Certificate, EPR Registration, Plastic Waste Authorization, E-Waste Recycling Authorization, Biomedical Waste License, Hazardous Waste Management NOC, Solid Waste Management Authorization, Battery Waste Management, Ferrous & Non-Ferrous Import Pollution NOC.

4. Tender Services — replace existing sub-items with: GeM Registration, Vendor Assessment, Vendor Assessment OEM, Catalogue Upload on GeM, IREPS Registration, E-Procurement Registration, State Procurement Portal Registration, MSTC / E-Auction Portal Registration, Coal E-Auction Service, Tender Submission Service.

5. Digital Signature Certificate — replace existing sub-items with: Digital Signature (Organization), Digital Signature (Signing), Digital Signature (Signing + Encryption), DGFT Digital Signature, NRI Digital Signature.

6. Agreement & Contract — replace existing sub-items with: Non Disclosure Agreement, Partnership Deed, Residential Rent Agreement, Joint Venture Agreement, Commercial Rent Agreement, Affidavits, LLP Deed.

7. Small Business Support Service — replace existing sub-items with: Website Design, Logo Maker, Billing Software, Letter Pad Design, Visiting Card Design, Product Booklet, Business Booklet.

All sub-service items must be fully visible — no truncation, no 'show more' collapse, no items hidden. Each card's height must adjust dynamically based on its number of sub-services with no empty whitespace. The remaining 8 service cards (Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service) must remain exactly unchanged. Maintain the dark navy (#0a1628) background and golden yellow (#f5c518) accent styling. The layout must remain fully responsive (single column on mobile < 640px, multi-column grid on larger screens).

quotes: Expand the following service category cards and add the complete sub-service lists exactly as provided.
Each service card height should adjust dynamically based on number of sub-services, without empty space.
Do not change page layout or design

acceptanceCriteria: FSSAI License card displays exactly 5 sub-service items: FSSAI Registration, FSSAI State License, FSSAI Central License, FPO Mark Certification, FSSAI Annual Return Filing

Trademark Registration card displays exactly 7 sub-service items: Trademark Registration, Trademark Objection / Opposition Reply, Trademark Hearing, Brand Name Registration, Design Registration, Copyright Registration, Patent Registration

Pollution Control Board card displays exactly 10 sub-service items including CGWA Water Boring, CTE / CTO Certificate, EPR Registration, Plastic Waste Authorization, E-Waste Recycling Authorization, Biomedical Waste License, Hazardous Waste Management NOC, Solid Waste Management Authorization, Battery Waste Management, Ferrous & Non-Ferrous Import Pollution NOC

Tender Services card displays exactly 10 sub-service items including GeM Registration, Vendor Assessment, Vendor Assessment OEM, Catalogue Upload on GeM, IREPS Registration, E-Procurement Registration, State Procurement Portal Registration, MSTC / E-Auction Portal Registration, Coal E-Auction Service, Tender Submission Service

Digital Signature Certificate card displays exactly 5 sub-service items: Digital Signature (Organization), Digital Signature (Signing), Digital Signature (Signing + Encryption), DGFT Digital Signature, NRI Digital Signature

Agreement & Contract card displays exactly 7 sub-service items: Non Disclosure Agreement, Partnership Deed, Residential Rent Agreement, Joint Venture Agreement, Commercial Rent Agreement, Affidavits, LLP Deed
Small Business Support Service card displays exactly 7 sub-service items: Website Design, Logo Maker, Billing Software, Letter Pad Design, Visiting Card Design, Product Booklet, Business Booklet
No sub-service items are truncated, hidden behind a 'show more' button, or collapsed
Card height expands dynamically to fit all sub-service items with no empty whitespace at the bottom
The other 8 service cards (Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service) are unchanged
Card layout, icons, grid structure, and overall page design are unchanged
Dark navy (#0a1628) background and golden yellow (#f5c518) accent styling are maintained
All 15 service cards are visible and responsive on mobile (single column < 640px) and desktop (multi-column grid)

constraints: Do not change the Services page layout, grid structure, card design, or icons

Do not modify the 8 previously expanded service cards: Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance Service, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup Service
Do not alter any other page, component, or file outside of frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx
Sub-service items must never be hidden, truncated, or placed behind a 'show more' toggle
nonGoals: Adding new service categories beyond the existing 15
Modifying the Home page Services Preview section
Adding pricing, icons, or descriptions to individual sub-service items
